title: The gate — keep, kill, or merge every last one
prompt: Round 6: convergence. Every option gets a verdict before the gate opens; the keeps go to the judge deck.

options.label: Fusion Bloom
options.description: Halo's orbit wrapping Ember's flame — the synthesis candidate.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><ellipse cx="50" cy="52" rx="32" ry="18" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="6"/><path d="M41 58a9 9 0 0 0 18 0c0-6-9-15-9-15s-9 9-9 15z" fill="#f59e0b"/></svg>

options.label: Halo Solo
options.description: The orbit alone — cleanest at 16px, coldest at any size.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><ellipse cx="50" cy="50" rx="34" ry="20" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="8"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="8" fill="#a855f7"/></svg>

options.label: Prism Coda
options.description: The prism's last stand, teal arc and all.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><path d="M50 22L78 70H22z" fill="none" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="6"/><circle cx="50" cy="54" r="7" fill="#a855f7"/></svg>
